name: Amcil Limited
analysis: AMH has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 19% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.9100, stop A$0.8712, target A$1.0099 (2.57:1) — then trail it.
